# appdirs-stubs

% start short_desc

**Type stubs for appdirs**

% end short_desc

Based on the work by Sebastian Meßmer in <https://github.com/ActiveState/appdirs/pull/75>

## Installation

% start installation

`appdirs-stubs` can be installed from PyPI.

To install with `pip`:

```bash
$ python -m pip install appdirs-stubs
```

% end installation
